question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Cayenne – Félix Éboué Airport will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2025-03-16?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance_TEMPERATURE_celsius.81405.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-03-16 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-03-06) was 25.938. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Cayenne – Félix Éboué Airport.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - CAYENNE-MATOURY - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance_TEMPERATURE_celsius.81405.D.
